title: Document the connection path for podman --remote
body:
Issue: GH-7010
Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>
Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
I am not sure we want to support DOCKER_HOST at all.  

The issue with the original PR is that if you have podman and docker on the same remote client, you could have Podman attempting to talk to the Docker daemon IF DOCKER_HOST was defined even if you had a valid connection in containers.conf.

I think we ignore this environment variable if set.

I cleaned up the documentation and added it to the podman-remote man page.

And what's wrong with the Podman CI today?  Almost every PR has happy green test buttons?  ;^)
